name: remotion
description: Remotion sub-agent — programmatic React video rendering. Creates compositions, sequences clips, syncs audio, applies transitions/overlays, and renders MP4 videos. Inherits from animation parent.

skills.name: render-video
skills.description: Generates a Remotion composition and renders it as MP4/WebM/GIF via npx remotion render

skills.name: create-composition
skills.description: Generates a Remotion React composition component with useCurrentFrame, useVideoConfig, and interpolate

parameters.description: string — what the animation should do visually

skills.name: sequence-clips
skills.description: Generates a Remotion <Sequence> chain to arrange clips in order with offsets

parameters.clips: array — [{ name: string, from: number, durationInFrames: number }]

skills.name: audio-sync
skills.description: Generates Remotion code to sync audio tracks with visual frames

parameters.audioSrc: string — audio file path or URL

skills.name: transitions
skills.description: Generates Remotion transition effects: fade, slide, wipe, scale, flip

skills.name: overlays
skills.description: Generates Remotion overlay layers: text captions, watermarks, lower-thirds, progress bars

skills.name: deploy-video
skills.description: Generates deployment config for Remotion Lambda — render in cloud at scale
